design_philosophy: Browser-Core Modernism (DevTools UI). The application should feel like a highly structured, precise, and professional desktop application or IDE. Information density is high, layouts are rigid, and every panel is explicitly delineated by 1px borders.

rules.h1: font-sans text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900 leading-tight
rules.h2: font-sans text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-gray-900

spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid #e5e7eb or #d1d5db on almost all containers.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px to 4px) to maintain a technical, sharp DevTools aesthetic.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: subtle shadow exactly 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.1) for floating elements, popovers, and the main browser frame.

app_workspace.wrapper: Browser chrome frame wrapping the entire UI (Top bar with traffic light buttons, address bar).
app_workspace.left_sidebar: 256px fixed width, styled as an explorer tree.

components.buttons: Sharp corners or rounded-sm. Primary buttons use #06B6D4 bg with white text. Hover state darkens to #0891b2. Secondary buttons are white bg with #d1d5db border and gray text.
components.cards: bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-sm. No soft, large radii.
components.tables: Dense rows, 1px borders between rows and columns. Header row uses font-mono, uppercase text.
components.charts: Recharts. Tooltips must use JetBrains Mono. Axes use JetBrains Mono text-xs. Main line/bar color is #06B6D4.
components.inputs: bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500 focus:border-cyan-500 font-sans text-sm. For data-heavy inputs, use font-mono.
components.browser_chrome: A header component mimicking macOS/Chrome. Top edge has rounded-t-lg, bg-white or bg-gray-100, border-b border-gray-200. Three 12px circular dots on the left (Red, Yellow, Green). A centered gray pill for the address bar.
components.tabs: Square-edged tabs, active tab has a top 2px cyan border and white background, inactive tabs are gray-50.

motion.philosophy: Functional only, no spring physics. Linear or ease-in-out.
motion.duration: 0.4s ease-in-out for panel slides or fades. 0.15s for hover states.

landing_page_structure.hero: DevTools-style hero. A massive mock browser window containing the UI. Background should use a subtle technical CSS grid (e.g., repeating-linear-gradient).
landing_page_structure.features: Presented as IDE extensions or panels.
landing_page_structure.changelog: Release notes section, styled like a commit history or technical changelog (using monospace dates).
landing_page_structure.readme_manifesto: A dark container (#0f172a bg) mimicking a code editor or markdown file, using JetBrains Mono text, explaining the 'why' of the product.

image_urls.description: Marketing agency team working. Use in the 'About' or 'Testimonials' section as a grounded, human element amidst the technical UI.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'Inter' and 'JetBrains Mono' fonts from Google Fonts via next/font or standard HTML link tags.
Use standard Tailwind classes but strictly adhere to the defined color palette: bg-gray-100 for the app background, bg-white for panels.
Build a reusable 'BrowserFrame' layout component that wraps the landing page hero image AND the actual /app routes.
The 3-panel workspace MUST strictly follow the widths: 256px left, flex-1 center, 320px right. Use standard CSS flexbox or grid for this, ensuring h-screen and overflow handling per panel.
Use Shadcn UI components but override their border-radius to be rounded-sm or rounded-none to fit the DevTools aesthetic.
Apply 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust testing.
For the PDF export, rely on standard browser print CSS (@media print) to format the center stage report canvas cleanly.
